certificate.description: The module is a custom secure micro-controller. It can implement a variety of security, encryption, and cryptography protocols. The protocols are running on a secure processor on-chip, interfacing with a host using an API across a trusted SPI peripheral. It provides secure EEPROM Boot, using SPI pass-through technology that allows the module to confirm authorship of Boot Code, ensuring code-signing before code swap is completed.
